activities_projects.title: Poem Reading Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the basic idea of the poem
steps: Read the poem 'Rain on the Roof'
Identify what the poet is listening to
Write where the poet is lying
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the main situation in the poem

activities_projects.title: Rain Sound Identification
activities_projects.objective: Recognize the sounds described in the poem
steps: Find the line describing the sound of rain
Write the word used for the sound
Explain what 'patter' means
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognizes sound imagery in the poem

activities_projects.title: Drawing the Scene
activities_projects.objective: Visualize the situation in the poem
steps: Imagine rain falling on the roof at night
Draw a cottage with rain falling on it
Show the person lying on the bed listening to rain

activities_projects.title: Memory Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of memories in the poem
steps: Read the stanza about the poet's mother
Write what the poet remembers
Explain why the memory is special
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands emotional connection in the poem

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Activity
activities_projects.objective: Learn new words from the poem
steps: Find words like humid, melancholy, bliss
Write their meanings
Use them in simple sentences

activities_projects.title: Feelings in the Poem
activities_projects.objective: Identify the emotions expressed in the poem
steps: Read the poem carefully
Write how the poet feels while listening to the rain
Write two emotions expressed in the poem

activities_projects.title: Reading Aloud Activity
steps: Practice reading the poem
Focus on rhythm and pauses
Read it aloud in class

activities_projects.title: Line Meaning Activity
steps: Write the line 'Every tinkle on the shingles has an echo in the heart'
Explain its meaning in simple words
Discuss your answer with classmates

activities_projects.title: Rainy Day Writing
steps: Think about a rainy day you experienced
Write 5 sentences describing the sounds and feelings
Share your writing in class

activities_projects.title: Message of the Poem
activities_projects.objective: Understand the theme of the poem
steps: Think about what the rain reminds the poet of
Write the message of the poem
Explain it in 3–4 sentences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the theme of memories and comfort
